title: Mod Lang Fixes
description: A small resourcepack which fixes missing and/or incorrect lang entries in other mods.
body:
**PLEASE NOTE:** I am very well aware that these issues can be fixed via CraftTweaker scripts. However, this is meant for those who want a drop-in way of doing things, and do not want to fiddle around.

A simple resourcepack which fixes missing and/or incorrect lang entries in other mods. See the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/mlf/gallery) for images of this pack in action. (Beware that its very disorganized, I have no clue how to fix it.)

**Supported Mods**
- No Tree Punching (1.12 version is only on CurseForge.)
- Aether Additions (Only on CurseForge.)
- Aether Continuation (Only on CurseForge.)
- The Aether
- And of course, Minecraft itself (Some Vanilla items.)

**(For those wondering, a .lang file is what defines the names of items and blocks shown when hovering over them in your inventory or via WAILA or Jade.)**
